hyperedges.relation: The multi-layered generation process queries Neo4j for governance rules, PostgreSQL/pgvector for legal texts, and coordinates details through the REST endpoint.
Containers for PostgreSQL and Neo4j are spun up via Docker Compose, which are then connected to by the backend's SQLAlchemy engine and Neo4j driver singleton respectively.

hyperedges.description: Strictly governed generation flow ensuring LLM output is grounded in system mental model and checked by validators
Shared orchestration of deterministic roadmap compilation and AI learning augmentation
End-to-end unit and integration testing of the graph traversal and RAG roadmap assembly processes

hyperedges.label: Training Plan Generation Flow
hyperedges.description: Multi-component interactive flow in the frontend dashboard that allows a compliance reviewer to extract role details, generate a compliance training roadmap, evaluate its score, and submit revisions or approval.

metadata.description: Assembles role, responsibilities, and risks into a 4-quarter compliance training plan with full explainability trace
Traverses Neo4j for the full deterministic compliance path of a role
Scans LLM output for potential governance violations, vague patterns, or decision-making overrides
Validates parsed JSON against schemas for quiz, simulation, plan, evaluation, and role_info
Executes OpenAI API call with temperature=0, predefined mental model system prompt, and post-call validations
Predefined enterprise architectural guardrails preventing LLM from inventing risks, controls, or changing mappings
Regulation (EU) 2024/1624 on the prevention of the use of the financial system for money laundering or terrorist financing
E2E integration test suite validating plan generation, evaluation, revision, and database-state updates
Unit and integration tests validating database connections, graph traversal, and RAG roadmap generation endpoints
PostCSS configuration setting up Tailwind CSS version 4 integration
Next.js runtime and compiler configuration options
Main package dependencies including Next.js, React, Radix UI, axios, and lucide-react
Configuration file for Shadcn UI components setup, paths, style preferences, and component aliases.
Configuration settings for compiling the Next.js TypeScript application, specifying target, libraries, jsx style, and file inclusions/exclusions.
ESLint flat configuration module extending Next.js core web vitals and TypeScript standards while adjusting file ignore list.
Getting started guidelines, deployment documentation, and scripts overview for the Next.js compliance frontend application.
Rules and guidelines for LLM agents detailing modern Next.js conventions and API structures to avoid out-of-date patterns.
Reference file redirecting agents to AGENTS.md for coding guidelines.
App Router root layout file establishing HTML structure, standard styling classes, and rendering children under Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts.
Core page component acting as the Vidda Training dashboard. Orchestrates state across plan generation, saved plan selector, loading stages, and layout quadrants.
Collapsible row rendering for training modules, revealing metadata on responsibility, inherent risks, control, regulation, and governance traces.
Helper to transform and clean compliance planner payload variants from new and legacy API endpoints into uniform WorkflowData structure.
Panel widget presenting a list of previous training plans with relative time, module counts, and statuses (draft, revised, approved).
Formats Date timestamps to strings indicating relative time since generation.
Interactive workflow manager which enables direct reviewer feedback submission, triggering an asynchronous compliance plan revision.
Shows multi-dimensional scores (AML, relevance, actionability) with animated visual score progress bars.
A reusable SVG circular chart rendering overall scores on a base color gradient of excellence.
Submits unstructured text blocks to extract key compliance responsibilities and risks for initial staging.
Shadcn-based design-system button offering diverse custom sizing and visual states.
Combines clsx list and tailwind-merge library to avoid overlapping class conflicts.
File vector icon SVG asset used in the frontend application.
Vercel logo SVG graphic asset used in the frontend application.
Next.js vector logo SVG asset used in the frontend application.
Globe vector icon SVG asset used in the frontend application.
Window vector icon SVG asset used in the frontend application.

Containers for PostgreSQL and Neo4j are spun up via Docker Compose, which are then connected to by the backend's SQLAlchemy engine and Neo4j driver singleton respectively.

Shared orchestration of deterministic roadmap compilation and AI learning augmentation
End-to-end unit and integration testing of the graph traversal and RAG roadmap assembly processes
